title: EvolutionNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-evolution-optimizer-rs. Island-model genetic algorithm: a master orchestrates epochs, island workers evolve subpopulations, and elite individuals migrate around a ring between epochs.

$dd:nats.summary: Distributed island-model GA: island evolution jobs, results, ring migrants, and progress events.

subjects.name: EvolutionJobs
subjects.description: Per-island evolution jobs. The master publishes a subpopulation plus GA parameters for one epoch; island worker pods consume through the islands queue group and evolve it for N generations.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.evolution.jobs

subjects.name: EvolutionResults
subjects.description: Per-island evolution results. Islands publish the evolved (fitness-sorted) subpopulation and their best genome; the master aggregates them by solveId and epoch.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.evolution.results

subjects.name: EvolutionMigrants
subjects.description: Elite individuals migrating between islands on a ring topology between epochs. Carried inside the next epoch's jobs by the master; this subject lets observers tap migration flow.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.evolution.migrants

subjects.name: EvolutionEvents
subjects.description: Lifecycle and per-epoch progress events from the distributed GA (best-fitness-so-far, convergence, epoch boundaries).
subjects.subject: dd.remote.evolution.events

queueGroups.name: EvolutionIslandsQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by island worker pods so each per-epoch subpopulation is evolved exactly once.

streams.name: DD_REMOTE_EVOLUTION
streams.description: JetStream stream for distributed island-model GA jobs, results, ring migrants, and progress events.
